items.title: I changed two Linux settings for my Nvidia GPU and gained FPS I didn't know I was missing
items.summary: Linux and Nvidia haven’t exactly been known to work out of the box. Team Green’s GPUs have never been easy to set up or even use on Linux, and when compared to Windows, it is an objectively inferior experience.

items.title: These 5 Linux terminal commands save me hours every week
items.summary: A lot of the guides I came across when I started using Linux showed me how to work. I want to do the opposite and teach you how to stop working.
